name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.ShotShockSpinHelper.ShockSpinLiftForceMult
summary: If greater than 0, apply a force to lift the character up while the torque is applied, trying to produce a dramatic spun/twist shotgun-to-the-chest effect. This is a scale of the torque applied, so 8.0 or so would give a reasonable amount of lift.
remarks:
Default value = 0.0f.
            Min value = 0.0f.
            Max value = 2.0f.
